stemHtml: If the take-off and the landing are performed according to standard operational procedures, then, compared to a paved runway, short dry grass…

options.a: Decreases the take-off distance and decreases the landing distance.
options.b: Increases the take-off distance and increases the landing distance.
options.c: Decreases the take-off distance and increases the landing distance.
options.d: Increases the take-off distance and decreases the landing distance.
